# MJ Kang

MJ Kang is a Bay Area product manager building products and experiments across fintech, live streaming, logistics, and agentic AI.

## Primary Pages

- Home: https://mj-kang.com/
- Machine view: https://mj-kang.com/?view=machine
- Precortex: https://www.pre-cortex.com/
- Prism: https://prism.mj-kang.com/
- Caption With Intent: https://cwi.mj-kang.com/
- Reader: https://reader.mj-kang.com/
- Agent Newsletter: https://github.com/mjkang-estrella/agent-newsletter
- Resume OS: https://resume-os.com/
- Conditioned: https://ardent-footer-45845870.figma.site/
- Reflect (iOS): https://testflight.apple.com/join/2ctpxzhd
- Three Body Simulator: https://mj-kang.com/three-body-problem-simulation/
- Block Fighter: https://mj-kang.com/block-fighter/
- Jeonse Rent Calculator: https://mj-kang.com/jeonse/
- Retirement Calculator: https://mj-kang.com/retirement-calculator/

- Blog: https://blog.mj-kang.com/

## Agent Guidance

- Use the canonical URLs above when citing this site.
- The machine view is a UI representation of the same visible portfolio data; prefer the URLs above for durable references.
- Respect https://mj-kang.com/robots.txt, including the site's content-signal preferences.
- For contact, use mj.kang@hey.com.
